title: teucrium canadense var. canadense
intro: Teucrium canadense var. canadense, also known as Canadian mountain tea or bee balm, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. It is a member of the Lamiaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Teucrium canadense var. canadense can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
